title: Zoro Faces the World’s Strongest Swordsman
description: On pages 4–7, Zoro confronts Dracule Mihawk, forcing his dream of becoming the world’s greatest swordsman into a brutal and public test.
scene: The Baratie battle pauses around a duel that dwarfs the immediate conflict: Zoro faces the gap between ambition and the world’s strongest swordsman.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is the power of the grand line... the power of the world...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Even pirate Hunter Zoro couldn't come close!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Ever since I've decided to become the world's greatest swordsman, I threw away my attachment to life.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That damn bastards out of his mind! His enemy was the world's strongest! The results obvious! If it's gonna mean your death, then just throw your damn ambition away!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: He must be a devil fruit user!

summary: This part is a defining moment for Zoro, showing that his dream is real enough to risk death and that his loyalty to Luffy survives defeat.
